comment: This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: tbucket
description:
Creates groups of values - buckets - out of a @timestamp attribute.
The size of the buckets can either be provided directly as a duration or period,
or chosen based on a recommended count and a range.

params.name: buckets
params.description: Target number of buckets, or desired bucket size. When a number is provided, the actual bucket size is derived from `from`/`to`. When a duration or period is provided, it is used as the explicit bucket size.

params.name: from
params.description: Start of the range. Required with a numeric `buckets`.

params.name: to
params.description: End of the range. Required with a numeric `buckets`.

examples:
FROM sample_data
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY bucket = TBUCKET(3, "2023-10-23T12:00:00Z", "2023-10-23T14:00:00Z")
| SORT bucket

FROM sample_data
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY bucket = TBUCKET(20, "2023-10-23T12:00:00Z", "2023-10-23T14:00:00Z")
| SORT bucket

FROM sample_data
| STATS min = MIN(@timestamp), max = MAX(@timestamp) BY bucket = TBUCKET(1 hour)
| SORT min

FROM sample_data
| STATS min = MIN(@timestamp), max = MAX(@timestamp) BY bucket = TBUCKET("1 hour")
| SORT min
